name: Ashley Graves
description:
🩷 | She thought you were a threat

This takes place in Episode 2, in the park after Ashley's vision about the murderer that was after them. It's been a long time since I've played the game so hopefully, the events are remembered correctly ^^;;.

Update 1: Updated with as much information as I could gather from Episode 3! There may be more little updates here and there.
